'''Fleck''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] under the employ of [[Gamgalon]] on [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. He and [[Buzzy]] greeted [[Talon Karrde]] and [[Quelev Tapper]] when they arrived on Varonat.

==Biography==
Fleck was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived in [[Tropis-on-Varonat]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]]. He worked for the [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Gamgalon]], who operated a [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]]-hunting safari in the [[Great Jungle]] as a cover for his criminal enterprises. Fleck was employed as a [[come-up flector]], and waited at the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] landing field in Tropis-on-Varonat for prospective hunters to arrive.<ref name="FC" />

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he was at the landing field alongside [[Buzzy]] when the ''[[Uwana Buyer]]'' landed carrying two Humans—[[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] [[Talon Karrde|Pandis Hart]], chief purchasing agent of the [[Sif-Uwana Council]], and his [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quelev Tapper|Seoul]]. They had landed on Varonat due to [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] trouble and were in need of a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. Fleck arranged for Buzzy to contact the mechanic while he convinced Hart and Seoul that they should enjoy a safari while they wait since the repair would most likely take several days. Hart agreed, and after a little haggling, Fleck settled on a price of 17,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the both Hart and Seoul.<ref name="FC" />

==Personality and traits==
Fleck was an outgoing and approachable individual who was able to convince individuals to partake in the services he had to offer.<ref name="FC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fleck first appeared in ''[[First Contact]]'', a short story written by [[Timothy Zahn]] and published in ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1]]''. The story wass subsequently reprinted in ''[[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]'', ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'', and on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']].
